rationale: Article VIII §1-i concerns ad valorem tax relief for mobile marine drilling equipment. It does not address residence homestead exemptions or impose any limitation relevant to Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The legislature by general law may provide ad valorem tax relief for mobile marine drilling equipment designed for offshore drilling of oil or gas wells that is being stored while not in use in a county bordering on the Gulf of Mexico or on a bay or other body of water immediately adjacent to the Gulf of Mexico.
_note: Cited constitutional provision is unrelated to homestead exemptions; no conflict found. The relevant constitutional authority for homestead exemptions would be Tex. Const. art. VIII, §1-b, not §1-i.
